report.title: e-Surveyor: My Sites
report.description: Report for a user's sites selector in e-Surveyor
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM samples s JOIN cache_samples_nonfunctional snf on snf.id=s.id LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values hab ON hab.sample_id=s.id AND hab.sample_attribute_id=1866 AND hab.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms habt ON habt.id=hab.int_value LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values habother ON habother.sample_id=s.id AND habother.sample_attribute_id=1867 AND habother.deleted=false WHERE s.survey_id=#survey_id# AND s.created_by_id=#user_id#
